content:
Hi!

I enabled "rust samples" in menuconfig and I thought the modules would be set, but all of them were not set, eg:

# CONFIG_SAMPLE_RUST_MINIMAL is not set
...
# CONFIG_SAMPLE_RUST_PLATFORM is not set

Looking in https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust/.github/workflows/kernel-x86_64-debug-thinlto.config
I didn't find CONFIG_SAMPLE_RUST_PLATFORM.
What is it for, please?
It is for a sample platform driver. You can see which what a config option does by reading their description, e.g. in menuconfig or directly in the Kconfig files.
